purpose: Record expanded droid feat implementation pass for Scavenger's Guide to Droids and Clone Wars Campaign Guide feats requested after the initial droid combat feat pass.

skippedAsAlreadyImplemented.name: Aiming Accuracy
skippedAsAlreadyImplemented.reason: Already normalized as AIM_ACTION_VARIANT and exposed through the droid combat action adapter/runtime helper.

skippedAsAlreadyImplemented.name: Mechanical Martial Arts
skippedAsAlreadyImplemented.reason: Already normalized as UNARMED_HIT_RIDER and exposed through getUnarmedHitRiders.

skippedAsAlreadyImplemented.name: Multi-Targeting
skippedAsAlreadyImplemented.reason: Already normalized as AIM_ACTION_RIDER and exposed through getAimActionRiders.

skippedAsAlreadyImplemented.name: Pincer
skippedAsAlreadyImplemented.reason: Already covered by the grapple feat implementation pass and not duplicated in droid-combat metadata.

implementedEntries.name: Leader of Droids
implementedEntries.mechanic: Exposes a policy for beneficial Mind-Affecting allied effects that lets a number of willing droid allies equal to Intelligence modifier, minimum 1, ignore Mind-Affecting immunity for that effect only.

implementedEntries.name: Turn and Burn
implementedEntries.mechanic: Withdraw action rider exposes 2 threatened squares without AoO, full-speed Withdraw, and Force Point reaction Withdraw when an enemy ends adjacent.

implementedEntries.name: Shield Surge
implementedEntries.mechanic: Vehicle shield reaction helper exposes damage reduction up to remaining Shield Rating after SR reduction, with equal SR cost and Recharge Shields lockout for one round.

implementedEntries.name: Sensor Link
implementedEntries.mechanic: Swift action helper exposes 24-square sensor broadcast, awareness sharing, remote Perception Aid Another, and mutual Sensor Link +2 Perception bonus.

implementedEntries.name: Pinpoint Accuracy
implementedEntries.mechanic: Damage rider exposes Recover-action lockout until the end of the target's next turn when Aiming Accuracy damages the target.

implementedEntries.name: Logic Upgrade: Skill Swap
implementedEntries.mechanic: Full-round skill swap action metadata exposes selected untrained skill behavior, original trained-skill suppression, and Use the Force exclusion.

implementedEntries.name: Ion Shielding
implementedEntries.mechanic: Ion threshold rider exposes -1 CT instead of -2 CT when pre-halved Ion damage equals or exceeds Damage Threshold.

implementedEntries.name: Erratic Target
implementedEntries.mechanic: Movement defense rider exposes speed-to-Dodge tradeoff, up to +2 Dodge, requiring at least 2 squares moved and Hovering/Flying locomotion.

implementedEntries.name: Droid Shield Mastery
implementedEntries.mechanic: Shield recharge helper exposes automatic Endurance success, 5 SR restored, and two-Swift recharge timing.

implementedEntries.name: Droid Focus
implementedEntries.mechanic: Context helper exposes +1 selected skills on/against chosen droid degree and +1 defenses against attacks/skill checks from that degree.

implementedEntries.name: Distracting Droid
implementedEntries.mechanic: Standard action helper exposes Persuasion vs Will in 6 squares, Mind-Affecting, lose Move Action on success, and flat-footed rider on success by 10.

implementedEntries.name: Damage Conversion
implementedEntries.mechanic: Threshold reaction helper exposes non-area, non-Ion, non-Force replacement that trades CT movement for escalating extra damage starting at +10 and increasing by +5 per encounter use.

automationBoundary.general: This pass follows the existing droid-combat metadata/helper pattern. It does not introduce a second droid feat engine.
automationBoundary.thresholdRiders: Damage/threshold workflows must call getDroidThresholdRiders to apply Ion Shielding and Damage Conversion during damage resolution.
automationBoundary.movementRiders: Movement/withdraw workflows must call getDroidMovementRiders for Turn and Burn and Erratic Target.
automationBoundary.vehicleShieldRiders: Vehicle shield workflows must call getDroidShieldRiders for Shield Surge and Droid Shield Mastery.
automationBoundary.droidFocus: Droid Focus requires a selected degree value on the feat item to fully resolve its context bonus. If no degree is selected, the rule is present but returns no bonus.
